compressed_prompt: Compose two angry limericks on moms' struggle with kids' chores; use *** for separation.
response:
Here are two angry limericks about the eternal chore battle:

My kids leave their dishes unwashed,
Their promises constantly squashed,
I scream and I yell,
They don't care, what the hell,
My patience has fully been squashed!

***

I've asked them to vacuum the floor,
They've ignored me at least thirty more,
I'm losing my mind,
They're so terribly blind,
I'll nail all their games to the door!
